one_time_description: COVID-19 pandemic noted as significant event in March 2020 with unknown financial impact
economic_notes: T'it'q'et has three business entities accounted for by modified equity method: T'it'q'et Economic Development Authority (not-for-profit), Rancherie Enterprises Ltd., and 1050033 B.C. Ltd. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue of $340,207 received in 2020.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated - only 'Chartered Professional Accountants' from Kelowna, BC dated July 27, 2020. Three entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs): T'it'q'et Economic Development Authority, Rancherie Enterprises Ltd., and 1050033 B.C. Ltd. Four funds consolidated: Operating Fund, Trust Fund, Social Housing Fund, Capital Fund. COVID-19 noted as significant subsequent event. Net financial assets is net debt of $2,203,058 (negative). total_government_transfers includes ISC $3,497,533 + DFO $17,500 + CMHC $187,441 + FNHA $676,497 + Province of BC $319,000 + BC Hydro $133,818 + ASETS $56,036 + ISETS $19,175 = $4,906,000 approximately; osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. Annual debt service represents repayment of long-term debt per cash flow statement.
